privileged_info_summary: The task configures an eCommerce catalog in Odoo with synthetic products created at runtime. The main product 'Bamboo Standing Desk' (created in setup_task.sh line 77) must be published and added to the 'Sustainable Workspace' category (to be created by the task agent). The upsell product 'Motorized Bamboo Desk' (line 63) and cross-sell product 'Cable Management Box' (line 70) must be configured as product relations. The draft product 'Recycled Paper Organizer' (line 84) must be unpublished. All product names in metadata are verified to match the names created by the setup script.
